subject: [PATCH v6 15/15] Documentation/userfaultfd: document RWP working set tracking

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation to the Linux kernel's admin guide on userfaultfd (UFFD), specifically covering read-write protection (RWP) working set tracking. It explains the sync and async fault models, UFFDIO_RWPROTECT semantics, and UFFD_FEATURE_RWP_ASYNC. The documentation also covers a typical VMM working-set-tracking workflow from detection to eviction and back to async mode. This patch includes an example of how RWP works and its differences compared to other memory operations.
